creator: nicksaika@gmail.com
text:
After a power outage at work, I cleanly shut down the server while it
was still running on a UPS - this morning, I tried to boot up the machine
I get the "GEOM_MIRROR: Force device gm0 start due to timeout." message,
at which point the system just stops booting. The system is not unresponsive,
it just does not boot any further.

How-To-Repeat: The problem repeats itself on boot.
